case_title: ADONA M. PIERRE ET AL VS. UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC ARTHUR A. DUGONI SCHOOL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIERRE, ADONA M. BESS, MATTIE J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC $6,450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,450.00, JUDGMENT IS AGAINST DEFENDANT'S NAME AS CORRECTED: UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-20-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PIERRE, ADONA M. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY PIERRE, ADONA M. BESS, MATTIE J. UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU . PLAINTIFF'S ADONA PIERRE AND MATTIE BESS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF PACIFIC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANDERS NATTESDAD, PROFESSOR. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO ADONA PIERRE ON MAY 31, 2018. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-29-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (DATE BETTER FOR BOTH PLAINTIFFS) TRIAL OF JUN-01-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PIERRE, ADONA M. BESS, MATTIE J. AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.
